home.heading: Welcome
home.description: This boilerplate gives you a production-ready Electron app with a strongly-typed IPC bridge, TanStack Query, Tailwind, i18n, and auto-updates.

posts.heading: Posts
posts.description: An example feature fetching data with Axios + TanStack Query.

settings.heading: Settings
settings.storageHint: This demo persists a value in the main-process storage backend via typed IPC.

about.heading: About
about.body: Built with create-era-next — the modern successor to electron-react-boilerplate.
